characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light brown complexion. He has dark hair and a short goatee. He wears round wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: White t-shirt and a backwards floral baseball cap.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Interview practice mode. [Interview practice mode.]
Character A says: अब ये देखो। [Now watch this.]
Character A says: Good morning, sir. [Good morning, sir.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a quick, intriguing demonstration of the app's AI practice feature.
- Shows how easy it is to start a conversation.
- Sets up the problem/solution dynamic instantly.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैंने Supernova पर AI ट्यूटर सेट किया है। [I have set up the AI tutor on Supernova.]
Character A says: मैं बस माइक ऑन करता हूँ और बिना डरे इंग्लिश में बात करता हूँ। [I just turn on the mic and speak in English without fear.]
Character A says: आप इसे ऑफिस मीटिंग्स, कस्टमर कॉल्स, या दोस्तों से बात करने के लिए यूज़ कर सकते हैं। [You can use this for office meetings, customer calls, or talking to friends.]
Character A says: आज ही ऐप डाउनलोड करें और अपनी इंग्लिश बेहतर बनाएं। [Download the app today and improve your English.]
Character A says: खुद ट्राई करके देखो। [Try it yourself and see.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the core value proposition (AI tutor for fearless speaking).
- Lists highly relatable, real-world use cases for the target demographic.
- Delivers a warm, encouraging call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova AI Tutor
Speak without fear
✅ Office meetings
✅ Customer calls
✅ Talking to friends
Download Supernova today!
Try it yourself
